input.background: A 1970s case-control study on cerebrovascular disease (stroke) and oral contraceptive use in young women matched cases to controls according to neighborhood, age, sex, and race. Table 18.26 displays data from this study for thrombotic stroke.
input.question: Calculate the odds ratio for these data. Briefly, interpret this results in narrative form.

Matched_pairs.description: Categories of matched pairs based on control exposure status.

Case_exposed.description: Number of cases exposed to oral contraceptives.

Case_not_exposed.description: Number of cases not exposed to oral contraceptives.

Control_exposed.description: Number of controls exposed to oral contraceptives.

Control_not_exposed.description: Number of controls not exposed to oral contraceptives.
